nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for routine problems
nodes.grounding_span: I give AI complex topics to quickly solve if I don't have the time to solve it myself

nodes.label: AI accuracy for numerical vs. textual tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI inaccuracy for complex textual interpretation
nodes.grounding_span: AI seems to be accurate with these sort of numerical problems. However, AI has shown significant issues with regards to reading and interpreting whole papers

nodes.label: AI transparency through step-by-step breakdown
nodes.grounding_span: I ask it to break it down to each step. This enables me to scan the break down quickly, and determine that the process is accurate

nodes.label: Human skill maintenance as verification safeguard
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI without human skills
nodes.grounding_span: I am of the strong opinion that humans should maintain and develop the skills that AI could potentially take over

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I give AI complex topics to quickly solve if I don't have the time to solve it myself

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: for accuracy I read them myself, even though it takes more time

nodes.label: Human competence and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: without knowing having the skills myself then I would not of been able to identify the error and correct it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for routine numerical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI seems to be accurate with these sort of numerical problems

nodes.label: Frustration and distrust due to hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: the data had incorporated hallucinated statements. This lead to ... significantly reducing my trust in AI - which was very frustrating

nodes.label: Commitment to verification-focused approach
nodes.grounding_span: I will definitely maintain my way of working with AI

nodes.label: Step-by-step verification — decomposes AI outputs into checkable steps
nodes.grounding_span: I ask it to break it down to each step. This enables me to scan the break down quickly, and determine that the process is accurate

nodes.label: Experience-driven trust calibration — adjusts trust based on past accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: AI has shown significant issues with regards to reading and interpreting whole papers. Thus, for accuracy I read them myself
